case_title: CHRISTOPHER SANTOS VS. LUIS CARLOS GUZMAN

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-22-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-22-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,550.00 FILED BY SANTOS, CHRISTOPHER AS TO DEFENDANT GUZMAN, LUIS CARLOS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-22-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
